'''jajate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadriennially|quadriennially]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-j-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadriennially|quadriennially]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jajate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:jajate|jajate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jajatesher|jajatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jajatesherĂ«m|jajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jajatero|jajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jajateshĂ«|jajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jajateshĂ«m|jajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijajatero|gokijajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijajateshĂ«|gokijajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijajateshĂ«m|gokijajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojajankerom|gojajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojajankeshĂ«|gojajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojajankeshĂ«m|gojajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojajankeya|gojajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jajaterom|jajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jajatemu|jajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jajateya|jajateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijajaterom|gokijajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijajatemu|gokijajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijajateya|gokijajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:jajajate|jajajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jajajatesher|jajajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jajajatesherĂ«m|jajajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jajajatero|jajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jajajateshĂ«|jajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jajajateshĂ«m|jajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijajajatero|gokijajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijajajateshĂ«|gokijajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijajajateshĂ«m|gokijajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojajajankerom|gojajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojajajankeshĂ«|gojajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojajajankeshĂ«m|gojajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojajajankeya|gojajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jajajaterom|jajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jajajatemu|jajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jajajateya|jajajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijajajaterom|gokijajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijajajatemu|gokijajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijajajateya|gokijajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠjĂŠte|jĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠjĂŠtesher|jĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠjĂŠtero|jĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠjĂŠtero|gokijĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠjĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojĂŠjĂŠnkeya|gojĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠjĂŠterom|jĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠjĂŠtemu|jĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠjĂŠteya|jĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠjĂŠterom|gokijĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠjĂŠteya|gokijĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafjafte|jafjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafjaftesher|jafjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafjaftesherĂ«m|jafjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafjaftero|jafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafjafteshĂ«|jafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafjafteshĂ«m|jafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafjaftero|gokijafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafjafteshĂ«|gokijafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafjafteshĂ«m|gokijafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafjafnkerom|gojafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafjafnkeshĂ«|gojafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafjafnkeshĂ«m|gojafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafjafnkeya|gojafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafjafterom|jafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafjaftemu|jafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafjafteya|jafjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafjafterom|gokijafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafjaftemu|gokijafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafjafteya|gokijafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
